heading: Sale of property
label: 10708 Sale of property
text: A district court of the United States may direct the sale of any part of the property of a deceased seaman. Proceeds of the sale shall be held as wages of the seaman are held.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource section (U.S. Code)1070846:628Section 10708 permits a district court to sell a deceased seaman’s property and treat the proceeds as wages.
